project_type: Windows system-level content blocker using batch scripts and hosts file manipulation
language: Batch/PowerShell (Windows), HTML/JS for AI chat companion
build_system: No build system - batch scripts run directly on Windows
test_framework: Manual testing - batch scripts must be syntax-validated
build_command: N/A - static scripts. Validate batch syntax with basic checks.
test_command: Validate file structure exists and domain lists are non-empty
verification_instructions: 1. Check all .bat files have proper syntax (no unclosed quotes, proper labels). 2. Check all domain list .txt files are formatted correctly (one domain per line). 3. Check HTML/JS files for the AI chatbot have no syntax errors. 4. Verify all new domain categories are covered.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - these are standalone scripts for Windows users
environment_constraints: Scripts are for Windows but we develop/validate them on Linux. Cannot execute .bat files here. Use syntax validation and structural checks.
contribution_requirements: All UI text must be in Spanish. Product must be professional quality suitable for sale.
key_patterns: Domain lists are plain text with one domain per line (with www. variants). Batch scripts use @echo off, net session for admin check, hosts file at %SystemRoot%\System32\drivers\etc\hosts with 0.0.0.0 prefix. Registry policies applied for Chrome/Brave/Edge/Firefox/Opera.
directory_structure: pc-blocker/ - Contains batch scripts for system-level blocking and plain text domain lists. Currently has: instalar-bloqueo.bat (main installer), desinstalar-bloqueo.bat (uninstaller), bloquear-desinstalacion.bat (anti-uninstall), and 3 domain list files (pornography, prostitution, gambling/loans).
